case_title: JOHN BURNS VS. TOMMY J. BOYLAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. 9506).
